content:
🚀 #OpenToWork | Frontend React Developer | 3 Years Experience | Immediate Joiner

Hello DEV Community 👋

I am Bhargavi Simhadri, a Frontend React Developer with 3 years of experience building responsive and user-friendly web applications.

💻 Skills:

⚛️ React.js

🟨 JavaScript

🎨 HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap

🌐 REST API Integration

🔧 Git, GitHub, Netlify, Vercel

I am currently looking for:

✅ Full-time Opportunities

✅ Remote Roles

✅ Freelance Projects

✅ Contract Roles

📍 Preferred Locations: Hyderabad, Visakhapatnam, Bangalore, Chennai

✅ Open to relocation

⚡ Immediate Joiner

🔗 Portfolio: https://bhargavi-dev.vercel.app/

If your team is hiring or you know of any opportunities, I would truly appreciate a referral or connection.

Thank you for your support. 🙏
